data.title: Chainalysis Report Reveals Rising Sophistication in Crypto Crime
data.description:
Stablecoins now dominate 63% of illicit crypto transactions, surpassing Bitcoin as criminals exploit their speed and regulatory blind spots.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/chainalysis-report-reveals-rising-sophistication-in-crypto-crime/

data.title: Massive Losses For Crypto Traders As MELANIA Memecoin Plummets
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin’s Risk Factor Remains High, Crypto Analyst Notes
data.description:
A crypto analyst believes that Bitcoin remains a very risk-on asset that is linked to the shifts in the macroeconomic landscape. Emily Nicolle, a crypto reporter for Bloomberg, gave her take on Bitcoin as the firstborn cryptocurrency plunged 13% and entered bear territory. This might have been due to macroeconomic uncertainty and political factors. Related Reading: Dogecoin Sees 95% Drop In...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoins-risk-factor-remains-high-crypto-analyst-notes/

data.title: Official Trump Fires Up 19.7% in Past 24 Hours as International Relations Heat: Can This Hold?
data.description:
Official Trump (TRUMP) spiked 19.7% to $13.98 amid Trump-Zelenskyy tensions but retreated to $12.98 as resistance holds. Traders eye $12.19 support for the next move.
The post Official Trump Fires Up 19.7% in Past 24 Hours as International Relations Heat: Can This Hold? appeared first on Cryptonews.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/official-trump-fires-up-19-7-in-past-24-hours-as-international-relations-heat-can-this-hold/

data.title: Dogecoin Eyes Breakout From Falling Wedge, Targets $0.434
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) appears ready to break out of a falling wedge, which could push its price to $0.434. Dogecoin has been consolidating within a falling wedge. We could see a bullish change soon should the pattern complete. DOGE is currently approaching the wedge’s upper limit thus raising the possibility of breaking out. Falling wedges often […]

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/01/dogecoin-eyes-breakout-from-falling-wedge-targets-0-434/

data.title: Solana supply rises as FTX unlocks 11.2 million SOL worth around $2 billion
data.description:
Solana’s SOL circulating supply has increased by 2.2% after 11.2 million SOL tokens were unlocked from the FTX bankruptcy estate. The SOL, worth around $2 billion at current market value, includes a sizable portion of the 41 million SOL tokens that FTX administrators sold at auction during the bankruptcy process. With the unlock, the SOL […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-as-ftx-unlocks-11-2-million-sol/

data.title: Scientists Create Water-Harvesting Technology That Uses Kitchen Scraps and Seashells
data.description:
University scientists converted everyday waste into sorbents that produce nearly four gallons of water daily with minimal energy.
source: https://decrypt.co/308348/scientists-clean-water-harvesting-technology

data.title: US judge dismisses SEC’s lawsuit against Richard Heart and Hex, PulseChain on jurisdictional grounds
data.description:
The judge ruled that statements Heart made after the "offer period" of the assets were irrelevant to the SEC's claims of fraud.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/344078/us-judge-dismisses-secs-lawsuit-against-richard-heart-and-hex-pulsechain-on-jurisdictional-grounds?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
